_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Auto-amend scope violations matching per-project allow-patterns

steps.description: Parse auto_amend_scope from .iw-orch.json in orch/daemon/project_registry.py; add ProjectConfig.auto_amend_allow_patterns and auto_amend_max_paths fields with malformed-input tolerance
Add pure should_auto_amend(violations, allow_patterns, max_paths) helper to orch/daemon/scope_amendment.py using fnmatch + anchor-containment matcher consistent with scope_overlap._matches

Hook auto-amend inline into orch/daemon/fix_cycle.py:_complete_fix_cycle after the escalation branch; emit scope_auto_amended event, create new StepRun, set step to pending. Update docs/IW_AI_Core_Daemon_Design.md and .iw-orch.json example (commented-out block).

Extend tests/integration/test_scope_amend_endpoints.py with positive + negative auto-amend integration tests covering manifest update, both events emitted, StepRun creation, step transition, and no-match fallback
Per-agent code review of all implementation work in S01-S04
Apply CRITICAL and HIGH fixes from S05 review
Cross-agent final review of all changes for consistency, integration correctness, completeness
Apply fixes from S07 final review
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
